name: Market Research Analyst
description: AI-powered market research and competitive analysis agent for Southeast Asian markets
longDescription: Market Research Analyst automates competitive landscape analysis, market sizing, and trend identification for Malaysian and SEA markets. Generates structured reports with actionable insights, TAM/SAM/SOM calculations, and competitive positioning matrices. Built for founders and product teams who need fast, data-driven market intelligence.
author: Syncoe <ops@syncoe.com>
useCases: Validate market opportunity before building a product
Monitor competitor moves and positioning changes
Size the addressable market for Malaysian SME verticals
